title: 8pcs 2oz Glass Juice Bottles with Lids and Labels, Reusable Small Clear Jar for Juice, Ginger, Wellness Shot, Sample, Travel Portable Mini Bottles with Wide Mouth, Leakproof, Dishwasher Safe
features: 🍎[Premium Glass Material for Quality] Our 2oz/60ml glass jars are made of thick glass which are food grade and BPA free. These mini bottles are safe for storing different food items without any smell. Bottom diameter: 1.69in, height: 3in, mouth width: 1.2in.

🍇 [Easy to Use] Classic lids are made of food grade PET materials which are simple to use and seal well to ensure your drink hygiene. The max temperature that plastic lids can withstand does not exceed 60 °C, please let the liquid cool before covering the lid.

🍊[Product Design] Our tiny glass juice bottles with wide mouth which can be easily filled with either liquids or some other spices and seasonings. In order to make it easy to distinguish the use, we have prepared you blank stickers which can be written with any pen and waterproof.

🍓[Portable and Versatile Uses] Our small glass containers with lids are suitable for holding all kinds of liquids, can be used as juice bottles, ginger bottles, hot sauce bottles, sample bottles, as small bottles for wellness, bolus, spices, seasoning. For daily, party activities, travel or for grab-and-go, these 2oz bottle takes up minimal space in your bag or refrigerator.

🍑[Reusable] After using the shot bottles, just put them in the dishwasher to clean up with no hassle! But the cap is suitable for cleaning separately. We have prepared cleaning brushes, if you can't reach the bottom of the bottle when cleaning, you can use the cleaning brush to clean the inner space of the glass jar.
description: Product Description Unfinished jam can be preserved in separate containers to maintain freshness, prevent dust accumulation, and eliminate odors. Keep your life fresh. The product is portable for easy transportation and effectively prevents moisture. Lead-free. Bottle is diswasher safe.The cap is*NOT*diswasher safe. Druable glass and portable. Notice:If there are any issues with the product quality, we are always at your service.
